aesthetic_concept: Tactical Terminal: A dense, Bloomberg-inspired crypto trading dashboard. Deep obsidian backgrounds with strict 1px grid borders. Neon accents are used strictly as functional indicators (Green = Profit/Safe, Red = Danger/Rug, Violet = AI Score, Cyan = Cross-Call Signal). No soft purple gradients or generic AI-slop aesthetics. High-speed, high-density, pro-trader vibe.

typography.primary_font_usage: Marketing headers, page titles, big numbers.
typography.mono_font_usage: All data tables, tickers, scores, wallet addresses, and timestamps. (Crucial for the terminal look)

layout_and_spacing.general: Dense and compact for the terminal (Dashboard, Portfolio). Generous spacing for the Marketing/Landing page.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Full-width flex or CSS Grid. Use h-screen where possible to create an app-like terminal that doesn't scroll the body but scrolls internal panels.
layout_and_spacing.panel_style: Cardless design. Use 1px solid borders (#1A1A24) to separate panels. No rounded corners (rounded-none) or maximum rounded-sm to maintain the tactical, strict aesthetic.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00FF66] text-black font-mono uppercase text-sm font-bold tracking-widest hover:bg-[#00FF66]/80 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,255,102,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#1A1A24] text-white hover:border-[#00E5FF] hover:text-[#00E5FF] font-mono text-sm
buttons.danger: bg-[#FF3366]/10 border border-[#FF3366]/50 text-[#FF3366] hover:bg-[#FF3366] hover:text-black font-mono text-sm

data_tables.header: sticky top-0 bg-[#0A0A0D] border-b border-[#1A1A24] text-[#8A8A9E] font-mono text-xs uppercase py-2 px-4
data_tables.row: border-b border-[#1A1A24] hover:bg-[#14141A] transition-colors cursor-pointer group
data_tables.cell: py-1.5 px-4 font-mono text-sm align-middle whitespace-nowrap

components.score_ring: SVG circle with stroke-dasharray based on the 0-100 score. Color maps to AI Violet (#B026FF) for high scores.
components.live_ticker: Scrolling marquee (using react-fast-marquee) at the top or bottom of the screen showing top gainers. Font: JetBrains Mono text-xs, colors glowing based on positive/negative.
components.badges: Square edges, 1px border, stark contrast. e.g. AI Signal

pages.name: Landing
pages.layout: High-impact hero. Deep black background with neon abstract data grid. Massive Cabinet Grotesk header. Mockup of the terminal in the center with a glowing 1px border. Feature bento box below.

pages.name: Dashboard Live
pages.layout: 3-column Terminal view. Left: Watchlist & Alerts. Center: Live Token Feed Table (Updates every second). Right: Quick Action/Snipe Panel & Mini Chart.

pages.name: X Watchlist (KOL Surveillance)
pages.layout: Grid of KOL profile cards showing win rate, ROI, and recent calls. A 'Cross-Call' priority feed on the side showing tokens mentioned by multiple KOLs.

pages.name: Trending & Narratives
pages.layout: Bento layout categorizing trending metas (e.g., AI Agents, Memes, PolitiFi). Heatmaps based on volume and X mentions.

pages.name: Token Detail
pages.layout: Pro layout. Top: Token info, Risk Badges, AI Score breakdown. Left: Big Chart Embed. Right: Order book / Trade history. Bottom: Holder distribution (Bubble map mock).

pages.name: Portfolio (Paper Trading)
pages.layout: Split view. Top: P&L equity curve chart. Bottom: Table of open positions with real-time unrealized P&L.

pages.name: Settings
pages.layout: Two-column layout. Left: Navigation (General, Alerts, Wallets). Right: Configuration forms (Slippage, Gas fee presets, RPC endpoints).

motion.general: Minimalist and snappy. No bouncy animations. Use rapid fade-ins (duration 150ms) for new table rows. Numbers should flash green/red on change.
motion.flash_update: When a price or metric updates, temporarily flash the background of the table cell green or red, then fade back to transparent over 500ms.

hero_background.description: Green light abstract geometric data pattern, used for the main landing page hero background with a dark overlay.

terminal_texture.description: Abstract blue/cyan grid pattern with glowing lines for subtle terminal panel backgrounds.

solana_logo.description: Dark aesthetic crypto coin imagery for token placeholder visuals.

testing_attributes: Ensure ALL buttons, navigation links, and key metric cells have descriptive data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='snipe-button-tokenX', data-testid='live-feed-row-1').
